Sophistication.Example: Level 1: "This makes you feel good" Level 3: "This helps restore your natural energy levels" Level 5: "This facilitates mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1α upregulation"

Urgency.Example: Level 1: "Take your time deciding" Level 2: "Limited supply available - secure yours today" Level 5: "LAST CHANCE! Offer expires in 3 hours!"

Empathy.Description: Warm and understanding of reader's struggle
Empathy.Example: Level 1: "Many people experience fatigue" Level 4: "If you've felt that crushing afternoon slump that makes even simple tasks feel impossible, you're not alone" Level 5: "I know the pain of watching life pass by while you're too exhausted to enjoy it"

Authority.Example: Level 1: "I found this works well" Level 3: "Clinical research shows this approach supports healthy energy levels" Level 5: "I've discovered the ultimate secret that doctors don't want you to know"

Formality.Example: Level 1: "Hey, check this out!" Level 2: "Here's what makes this different" Level 5: "We cordially invite you to consider our solution"

Forbidden.Example: ❌ "We all know how frustrating this is" → ✅ "You know how frustrating this is"

Category.name: Vague Claims
Category.Replacement: Use specific, grounded language from EvidencePack

Pattern.name: Direct Address
Pattern.Rule: Speak directly to reader using "you" consistently

Pattern.name: Active Voice
Pattern.Example: ❌ "Energy levels are restored by the formula" ✅ "The formula restores your energy levels"

Pattern.name: Concrete Language
Pattern.Rule: Use specific, sensory details over abstractions
Pattern.Example: ❌ "Improved wellness" ✅ "Wake up refreshed, power through your afternoon without a slump"

SentenceStructure.VarietyRule: Mix short (5-10) and medium (15-20) sentences for rhythm
SentenceStructure.OpeningRule: Start paragraphs with clear topic sentence

ParagraphStructure.WhitespaceRule: Frequent paragraph breaks for readability (web copy)

OnVoice.Title: Example: Mechanism Explanation (On-Voice)
OnVoice.Text: "Here's what makes this different. Instead of relying on caffeine or stimulants that give you a temporary jolt—and then crash—[PRODUCT] works at the cellular level. It supports your mitochondria, the tiny power plants inside your cells that produce 90% of your body's energy. As you age, mitochondrial function naturally declines. That's why you feel exhausted even after a full night's sleep. [PRODUCT] helps restore that function, so you get sustained energy throughout the day. No jitters. No crash. Just steady, natural vitality."
OnVoice.Analysis: ✅ Second-person ("your cells", "you feel") ✅ Conversational but intelligent (sophistication: 3) ✅ Concrete language ("tiny power plants", "jolt and crash") ✅ Active voice ✅ Sentence variety (short + medium)

OffVoice.Title: Example: Mechanism Explanation (Off-Voice - Too Hype)
OffVoice.Text: "Discover the revolutionary breakthrough that's SHOCKING the health industry! This miracle formula unlocks your hidden energy potential using ancient wisdom combined with cutting-edge science. You'll experience stunning transformations as your body's secret energy centers are activated!"
OffVoice.Analysis: ❌ Hype words (revolutionary, shocking, miracle, unlock, stunning) ❌ Vague claims ("hidden energy potential", "secret energy centers") ❌ Excessive urgency/excitement (all caps, exclamation marks) ❌ Guru tone ("ancient wisdom", "discover")

OffVoice.Title: Example: Mechanism Explanation (Off-Voice - Too Clinical)
OffVoice.Text: "The formulation facilitates enhanced mitochondrial biogenesis through the upregulation of PGC-1α pathways, thereby optimizing oxidative phosphorylation and ATP synthesis. Subjects in clinical trials demonstrated statistically significant improvements in subjective energy assessments."
OffVoice.Analysis: ❌ Too sophisticated (level 5, target is 3) ❌ Jargon without explanation (PGC-1α, oxidative phosphorylation) ❌ Passive constructions ("is facilitated", "were demonstrated") ❌ No direct address (missing "you")

ComplianceNotes.LegalLanguage: When required disclaimers must be included, use smallest compliant font/placement
ComplianceNotes.Testimonials: Must include "results may vary" disclaimer per FTC guidelines
